senses.gloss: Khosrow (also Khosrov, Chosroes, Osroes), one of several Persian monarchs
an epithet applied to kings of Persia, Khosrow

etymology.text:
Borrowed from Classical Persian خُسْرَو (xusraw).
The epithet of Persian kings developed from the name. Compare the expanded use of Caesar to refer to the Roman emperors in general (and the many descendants of the Latin term, including Kaiser, царь (carʹ), and قَيْصَر (qayṣar)).
